title: Community Culture
description: DSML Kazakhstan works best when people share openly, challenge ideas with care, and help each other build real skills in AI, data, and engineering.

hero.promise: Rules are the minimum. Culture is the standard we choose when nobody is forcing us.

proofItems.context: Bring context before asking for help: goal, constraints, data, code, and what you already tried.
proofItems.evidence: Prefer evidence over status: benchmarks, sources, reproducible examples, and clear reasoning.
proofItems.care: Challenge ideas directly while protecting people, trust, and long-term collaboration.

welcome.title: Welcome to DSML Kazakhstan
welcome.intro: DSML Kazakhstan is a community for builders, researchers, students, founders, and practitioners who care about data, machine learning, and useful technology.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Create an open environment where people exchange knowledge, ship better work, and grow the AI ecosystem in Kazakhstan.

community.title: What makes us different
community.description: We value practical knowledge, peer support, high standards, and real connections between people who are serious about learning and building.

culture.description: The page is less about policing and more about the habits that make DSML useful: precise questions, generous answers, honest feedback, and respect for different levels of experience.

actions.description: Good participation makes the next person smarter, faster, or better connected. These are the behaviors we want to see more often.

boundaries.description: Boundaries keep the room focused and safe. They are here to protect learning, work, and trust, not to make the community feel formal or closed.

guidelines.title: How we show up
guidelines.relevant: Share content relevant to AI, ML, data science, engineering, research, product work, and careers.
guidelines.respectful: Keep the tone calm and professional, especially when disagreeing or giving critique.
guidelines.constructive: Give feedback that helps the other person improve the work, not just defend your opinion.
guidelines.original: Credit sources, label assumptions, and make it clear when you are sharing your own work.

prohibited.title: Boundaries that protect the room
prohibited.spam: Spam, growth hacks, and unauthorized advertising
prohibited.harassment: Harassment, personal attacks, and toxic behavior
prohibited.offtopic: Off-topic political fights or culture-war threads
prohibited.inappropriate: Discriminatory, explicit, or intentionally offensive content

process.title: Moderation is transparent
process.description: Moderation exists to keep the community useful. We start with clarification where possible and escalate only when behavior keeps harming the space.

steps.warning: Clarify the standard and give guidance
steps.temporary: Limit participation when the same issue repeats
steps.permanent: Remove access for serious or harmful violations

moderation.principle: The goal is not punishment. The goal is a high-trust space where people can learn, hire, collaborate, and discuss hard technical ideas.

respect.title: Respectful candor
respect.description: Be direct about the work and careful with the person. Strong critique and human respect should coexist.

learning.title: Continuous learning
learning.description: Ask better questions, share what worked, and make knowledge easier for the next person to find.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Help others connect, review, hire, mentor, and build. The network is stronger when value flows both ways.

innovation.title: Useful innovation
innovation.description: Novelty matters when it creates real progress: clearer models, better products, stronger research, and better decisions.

diversity.title: Range of backgrounds
diversity.description: Students, seniors, founders, researchers, and career switchers all belong when they participate in good faith.

excellence.title: High standards
excellence.description: We care about quality, evidence, and craft while staying generous with people who are still learning.

cta.title: Join a community with standards
cta.description: DSML is for people who want to learn faster, build useful systems, and raise the level of AI and data work in Kazakhstan.
